title: The U.S. Is Sending More Warplanes to the Middle East, Officials Say
summary_full: F-16 and F-35 jets were en route to the region from Europe, according to U.S. officials who were not authorized to speak publicly.
summary_public: F-16 and F-35 jets were en route to the region from Europe, according to U.S. officials who were not authorized to speak publicly.
